3145940.name: Type One
3145940.description:
STORY :
Some time ago humans found an alien astronaut named Robix, he warns us that there is an unknown force in Helan Mountain
that is stealing energy from the Earth's interior and if humans don't want to end up like the planet Mars, we have to stop them.
To make this possible, humans need Robix, unfortunately he was kidnapped by his relatives.

UNLOCKABLE :
- Character customization Body Parts -
- Weapon upgrade & Skins -
- Level Elements ( to see what to do ) -

CHARACTER UPGRADES :
Combine the body parts to get the best result

DIFFICULTY MODES :
have only affects the enemies and the games score
3145940.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
